anti_patterns.name: unwrap in production
anti_patterns.rule: NEVER use .unwrap() or .expect() outside #[cfg(test)]

anti_patterns.name: unsafe blocks
anti_patterns.rule: Zero tolerance for unsafe. No exceptions.

anti_patterns.name: pkill chain
anti_patterns.rule: NEVER chain after pkill — exit 144 kills && chains

anti_patterns.name: cp alias
anti_patterns.rule: Always \cp -f — cp is aliased to interactive mode

anti_patterns.name: JSON to RM
anti_patterns.rule: Reasoning Memory uses TSV format ONLY, never JSON

anti_patterns.name: stdout in daemon
anti_patterns.rule: Never write to stdout in daemons — SIGPIPE kills (BUG-018)

anti_patterns.name: git status -uall
anti_patterns.rule: Causes memory issues on large repos

anti_patterns.name: byte slice truncation
anti_patterns.rule: UTF-8 byte slicing panics on multi-byte chars

anti_patterns.name: unbounded Vec for logs
anti_patterns.rule: Use VecDeque with cap, not growing Vec

anti_patterns.name: no heartbeat check
anti_patterns.rule: Spheres with heartbeat=0.0 must be swept immediately

anti_patterns.name: code modification without reading
anti_patterns.rule: ALWAYS read a file before modifying it

anti_patterns.name: mono-parameter mutation (BUG-035)
anti_patterns.rule: Evolution chamber MUST NOT select same parameter repeatedly. ME had 84% targeting min_confidence. Use diversity-enforced round-robin with 10-gen cooldown.

anti_patterns.name: bridge URL http prefix (BUG-033)
anti_patterns.rule: Bridge URLs must NOT include http:// prefix — raw SocketAddr only

anti_patterns.name: Default ProposalManager (BUG-032)
anti_patterns.rule: #[derive(Default)] on ProposalManager sets max_active=0 — use custom impl Default

anti_patterns.name: POVM write-only (BUG-034)
anti_patterns.rule: POVM bridge must call /hydrate to read back state — write alone does nothing observable

anti_patterns.name: blocking in hook handler
anti_patterns.rule: NEVER block in HTTP hook handler — async only, sub-ms response required

anti_patterns.name: tight IPC reconnect loop
anti_patterns.rule: Never tight-loop reconnect to PV2 socket — use exponential backoff 100ms→5s

anti_patterns.name: hook fail-closed on bridge down
anti_patterns.rule: PreToolUse thermal gate must fail-OPEN if SYNTHEX is down — never block agent work due to bridge failure

anti_patterns.name: emergence cap exhaustion
anti_patterns.rule: RALPH emergence ring buffer must have TTL decay — cap alone leads to BUG-035 deadlock

anti_patterns.name: global k_mod without consent
anti_patterns.rule: Never modify k_mod without consent gate and per-sphere option
